review_of_v12_six_axes.methodology: raw 117 5-check on each of 6 v12 axes (T1-A/N-31..36): (1) orthogonality vs v11; (2) Akida-concrete-parameter falsifier reducibility; (3) cost / infra dependency; (4) deadline realism; (5) C3 honest-claim audit

axis_31_FISHER_RAO.orthogonality_check: PASS — 2nd-order statistical curvature distinct from v11 categorical-limit existence (0th-order)
axis_31_FISHER_RAO.falsifier_reducibility: PASS — d_FR(P_A, P_G) computable from Phi-distribution bootstrap; 1000-bootstrap on existing anima-clm-eeg corpus = in-repo prep before Akida arrival
axis_31_FISHER_RAO.cost_infra: LOW — software-only post-Akida-arrival; ~0 USD external; ~80 LoC hexa wrapper
axis_31_FISHER_RAO.deadline_realism: PASS — 2026-Q3 +14d realistic (3-substrate version Akida+GPU+IonQ feasible; full 15-class deferred)
axis_31_FISHER_RAO.c3_audit: PASS — Amari 1985 + Cencov 1982 anchors verified; uniqueness theorem invoked correctly
axis_31_FISHER_RAO.weakest_link: depends on 1000-bootstrap noise estimate sigma_intra; if sigma_intra mis-estimated, d_FR threshold 0.05 may be too tight or too loose
axis_31_FISHER_RAO.graduation_priority_post_review: 1 (HIGHEST — earliest empirical witness possible post-Akida arrival)

axis_32_WASSERSTEIN.orthogonality_check: PARTIAL — raw 136 was already in v11 raw-pool but as math-tool, not standalone limit-axis; v12 promotes to limit-axis-level via Brenier-McCann theorem-existence as ordinal anchor
axis_32_WASSERSTEIN.falsifier_reducibility: PASS — Sinkhorn entropic-OT eps=0.01 reference impl in POT (Python Optimal Transport) library; 105-pair on full 15-class set or 3-pair minimum on Akida+GPU+IonQ
axis_32_WASSERSTEIN.cost_infra: LOW — POT library reference + ~150 LoC hexa wrapper; ~0 USD external
axis_32_WASSERSTEIN.c3_audit: PASS — Brenier 1991 + McCann 1995 + Otto-Villani 2000 anchors verified
axis_32_WASSERSTEIN.weakest_link: v11→v12 orthogonality is THEOREM-LEVEL not RAW-LEVEL; reviewer may flag duplication; mitigation: explicit 'limit-axis promotion' marker in v12 axis_32 documentation

axis_33_PAGE_CURVE.orthogonality_check: PASS — TIME-DEPENDENT non-equilibrium claim distinct from v11 holographic-area-law + 2nd-law-arrow (equilibrium claims)
axis_33_PAGE_CURVE.falsifier_reducibility: PASS — 60-min thermal stress 300K→350K + S_Phi(t) tracking; Hayden-Preskill scrambling-time prediction concrete
axis_33_PAGE_CURVE.cost_infra: MODERATE — thermal chamber ~$200 (passive heater + thermocouple + USB power profiler) + Akida hardware
axis_33_PAGE_CURVE.deadline_realism: MARGINAL — 2027-Q1 presumes thermal chamber procurement + Akida bench-up by Q3; chamber procurement 4-week lead-time + Akida arrival window 2026-06-24 to 2026-07-22 = effective procurement 2026-Q4 minimum
axis_33_PAGE_CURVE.c3_audit: PASS — Page 1993 + Hayden-Preskill 2007 + Almheiri-Engelhardt-Marolf-Maxfield 2019 anchors verified; tau_scramble_A approx 8.4e-11 s computation traceable
axis_33_PAGE_CURVE.weakest_link: thermal-chamber Page-curve analog is LITERATURE-FIRST (no prior published precedent for non-quantum-gravitational substrate); reviewer 'extraordinary claim requires extraordinary evidence' risk; mitigation: pre-register HONEST C3 'first-attempt; null result is also informative'
axis_33_PAGE_CURVE.graduation_priority_post_review: 4 (MEDIUM — 5-star academic-impact but moderate cost + marginal deadline)

axis_34_RYU_TAKAYANAGI.orthogonality_check: PASS — SUBREGION-resolved entanglement strictly stronger than v11 holographic-area-law TOTAL-only
axis_34_RYU_TAKAYANAGI.falsifier_reducibility: PASS — 8-region partition + Renyi-2 entropy + bulk minimal-surface geodesic-tracing on SNN connectivity
axis_34_RYU_TAKAYANAGI.cost_infra: LOW — software-only post-Akida-arrival; geodesic-tracing on connectivity graph BFS
axis_34_RYU_TAKAYANAGI.c3_audit: PASS — Ryu-Takayanagi 2006 + Hubeny-Rangamani-Takayanagi 2007 + Penington-Almheiri-Engelhardt 2019 anchors verified
axis_34_RYU_TAKAYANAGI.weakest_link: the analog 'effective bulk minimal-surface' on classical SNN connectivity is NOT a true AdS bulk; the RT-formula application is by-analogy not by-derivation; the slope 1/(4*G_N_effective) requires defining G_N_effective for SNN — this is a NEW DEFINITION that may itself face review challenge

axis_35_CHAITIN_OMEGA.orthogonality_check: PASS — Sigma_1^0-hard random real strictly distinct from K-incomputability per Calude 2002
axis_35_CHAITIN_OMEGA.falsifier_reducibility: PASS — NIST SP 800-22 + Calude-Hertling-Khoussainov-Wang first-20-bits Omega K-bound estimation; 10^6-bit sample window per substrate-class
axis_35_CHAITIN_OMEGA.c3_audit: PASS — Chaitin 1975 + Calude-Hertling-Khoussainov-Wang 1998 + Solomonoff 1964 anchors verified
axis_35_CHAITIN_OMEGA.weakest_link: first-20-bits Omega is KNOWN constant per Calude 2002; using it as a YARDSTICK rather than a REPRODUCED witness is methodologically appropriate but may invite review nit; mitigation: explicit framing as comparator-yardstick not re-derivation

axis_36_GROTHENDIECK_UNIVERSE.orthogonality_check: PASS — kappa-inaccessibility STRICTLY STRONGER than psi(Omega_omega) at consistency-strength level
axis_36_GROTHENDIECK_UNIVERSE.falsifier_reducibility: MARGINAL — U_0/U_1/U_2 stratification reduces to: (a) per-substrate single-bench (15 in U_0); (b) Lawvere split-diagonal on Subst-15 (T1-N4 paired in U_1); (c) operadic 15-input composition colimit (T1-N10 paired in U_2); each step is itself challenging
axis_36_GROTHENDIECK_UNIVERSE.cost_infra: HIGH — Lean 4 / Agda formal proof gate ~500-600 LoC; full mechanized verification + 14+1 reflection-principle checks
axis_36_GROTHENDIECK_UNIVERSE.deadline_realism: MARGINAL — 2027-Q4 presumes Lean 4 proof completion + full 15-class access; 15-class access is r3 admin-blocked at 5/9 (ADMIN_BLOCKED + PENDING_SIGNUP) substrates; partial 8/15 bench likely
axis_36_GROTHENDIECK_UNIVERSE.c3_audit: PASS — Grothendieck 1972 SGA 4 + Tarski 1938 + Mac Lane 1969 + Lurie 2009 anchors verified
axis_36_GROTHENDIECK_UNIVERSE.weakest_link: ZFC + IC consistency-strength upgrade is meta-mathematical claim; empirical experiment can WITNESS reflection-failure but cannot PROVE inaccessible-cardinal-required (Gödel 2nd incompleteness blocks self-proof); reviewer 'experiment cannot establish meta-axiom' risk; mitigation: explicit framing as 'experiment would FORCE axiom-strengthening if reflection FAILS', not 'experiment ESTABLISHES inaccessible kappa'
axis_36_GROTHENDIECK_UNIVERSE.graduation_priority_post_review: 6 (LOWEST — highest cost, highest review-risk, longest deadline)

phase_0_immediate_in_repo_prep_2026_Q2_p.description: in-repo prep work that can complete BEFORE Akida arrival (4-8 week vendor lead-time window 2026-06-24 to 2026-07-22)

components: fn fisher_rao_geodesic_distance(p_dist: Distribution, q_dist: Distribution) -> Real
fn bootstrap_phi_distribution(epoch: EEGEpoch, n_bootstrap: Int=1000) -> Distribution
actions.verification: selftest with synthetic Phi-distribution P_A=Beta(2,2), P_G=Beta(2,2)+epsilon; assert d_FR(P_A,P_G) within numerical tolerance of analytical solution

components: fn sinkhorn_entropic_ot(P: Distribution, Q: Distribution, eps: Real=0.01, max_iter: Int=1000) -> Coupling
fn wasserstein_2_squared(coupling: Coupling, ground_metric: fn) -> Real
fn brenier_mccann_optimal_map(P, Q) -> Map  // primal-dual gradient flow
dependencies: POT library Python reference for cross-check
actions.verification: selftest against POT Python library on synthetic Gaussian-pair (W_2 closed-form) within 1e-3 relative error

actions.deliverable: anima/anima-physics/neuromorphic/chaitin_omega_irreducibility.hexa (~50 LoC) + integration with existing NIST SP 800-22 reference
components: fn nist_sp_800_22_15_tests(bit_sequence: [Bit]) -> TestResults  // wraps existing reference impl
fn k_min_estimate(bit_sequence: [Bit]) -> Real  // approximate K via compression
dependencies: external NIST SP 800-22 reference (C/Python); raw 175 source-and-docs-english
actions.verification: selftest with /dev/urandom bits → expect 13/15 PASS; with constant bits → expect <13/15 (negative control)

components: fn minimal_bulk_surface_geodesic(region: Region, connectivity: ConnectivityGraph) -> Real  // BFS shortest-path on SNN graph
fn rt_slope_fit(s_phi_array: [Real; 8], area_array: [Real; 8]) -> (slope: Real, residual: Real)
dependencies: substrate-internal connectivity graph for each substrate-class; for Akida: AKD-SDK introspection
actions.verification: selftest on synthetic 8-region uniform partition with known analytical S vs Area linear relation
actions.deadline: 2026-Q2 (6-week effort; can extend to Q3 post-Akida-AKD-SDK access)
